ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the project */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's repository */,
  "stars_count" INTEGER /* Total number of stars the project has received */,
  "forks_count" INTEGER /* Total number of forks the project has */,
  "open_issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of open issues in the project */,
  "closed_issues_count" INTEGER /* Number of closed issues in the project */,
  "watchers_count" INTEGER /* Number of users watching the project */,
  "last_commit_at" TEXT /* Date of the last commit to the project */,
  "readme" TEXT /* The README file content of the project */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of topics or tags associated with the project */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A calculated score representing the project's popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this release belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Date the release was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the release */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the release */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the release has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was opened */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was closed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels associated with the issue */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that depends on another project */,
  "dependent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being depended on */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependent project */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Whether the dependency is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forks" (
  "fork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fork */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was forked */,
  "forked_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forked project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the fork was created */,
  "forked_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the fork */,
  "forked_from_url" TEXT /* URL of the original project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forks_forked_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("forked_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forks_forked_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("forked_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaborator is working on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the collaborator joined the project */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the collaborator in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's avatar */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's personal website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_seen_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last seen on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was starred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who starred the project */,
  "starred_at" TEXT /* Date the project was starred */,
  "note" TEXT /* A note or comment by the user when starring the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stars_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stars_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the project */,
  "downloaded_at" TEXT /* Date the project was downloaded */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL from which the project was downloaded */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., source code, binary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases_using_this" (
  "release_using_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release using this project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is being used */,
  "dependent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is using the current project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project that is being used */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_using_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_using_this_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_using_this_dependent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages_using_this" (
  "package_using_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package using this project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is being used */,
  "dependent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that is using the current project */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package that is using the project */,
  "package_version" TEXT /* Version of the package that is using the project */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_using_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_using_this_dependent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_package_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_using_this_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
